message:
Running command: # Check for existing testbench files
DESIGN_ROOT="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
ls "$DESIGN_ROOT/tb/" 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
find "$DESIGN_ROOT" -name "*.py" -o -name "tb_*.v" -o -name "*_tb.v" 2>/dev/null | head -30
echo "---"
# Check the project-level verification folder too
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/verification/ 2>/dev/null
